@graph.name: The Entropy Index — Exit & Due-Diligence Anxiety
@graph.description: Operational debt exposure — tribal knowledge, undocumented dependencies, spaghetti logic. One bad due diligence report kills a nine-figure deal.

mainEntity.name: IPO readiness checklist for tech startups

acceptedAnswer.text: Buffett does not invest in companies that need a checklist to prove they are ready. He invests in companies whose integrity is continuous. Business Infinity keeps you in a state of permanent readiness — the checklist is a byproduct.

Due diligence tools find the problems. Business Infinity prevents them from existing. A company with versioned decision trails, institutional memory, and spec-driven governance passes due diligence by default.

Standardization for acquisition is cosmetic surgery. Continuous operational integrity is structural health. Value investing principles pay a premium for the latter and discounts the former. Business Infinity builds the latter.

mainEntity.name: Preparing for Series C due diligence in 2026

acceptedAnswer.text: If preparing for due diligence requires a multi-month sprint, your company has operational debt that will show up as a valuation discount. The fix is not preparation — it is permanent audit readiness built into daily governance.

mainEntity.name: Automated technical debt auditing for startups

acceptedAnswer.text: Technical debt is not just code — it is undocumented decisions, tribal processes, and key-person dependencies. A boardroom with The Digital Vanguard and Capital Steward agents audits this holistically, not just the repository.

mainEntity.name: Preparing for a predatory technical audit

acceptedAnswer.text: A predatory auditor looks for the gap between what you claim and what you can prove. Business Infinity eliminates that gap by creating a permanent, immutable record of every decision and its justification. There is nothing to find.

mainEntity.name: Automating software composition analysis for M&A

acceptedAnswer.text: Composition analysis for M&A reveals what you are made of. If the answer is 'tribal knowledge and duct tape,' the discount is devastating. The Capital Steward agent would say: the time to fix your composition is before anyone asks to see it.

mainEntity.name: Automating compliance and security for high-growth tech firms

acceptedAnswer.text: Compliance bolted on after growth is expensive and fragile. Compliance built into the governance fabric is free and permanent. Business Infinity makes every agent action auditable by design, not by retrofitting.
